view.title: Server {id} Arag
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: Ma hubtaa inaad dib u diri doonto iimaylka soo-dhawaynta?
view.emailSentMessage: Iimaylka soo-dhawaynta dib ayaa loo diray. Sanduuqaaga ka hubi.

reverseDns.title: Goobaha DNS Dib-u-Celinta
reverseDns.changeWarning: Isbeddelada DNS dib-u-celinta ilaa saacad ayay qaadataa muuqaashada.

ipmiLive.title: IP IPMI
ipmiLive.description: IP toos ah siiso kontaroolaha IPMI oo kuu xiddid IP-gaaga oo xaddidna 24 saacadood isticmaal.

order.title: Server Dalbo
order.hostnameHelp: Magaca hoyga isticmaal si aad u aqoonsato server-ka. Domain-ka ma u baahna in uu ansax yahay ama diiwaansan yahay. Hal dhibcood ayaa loo baahan yahay magaca hoyga. Tusaalooyinka kale: database.local, web.server ama magacaaga.
order.passwordRequirement: Xusuus: Erayga sirta waa inuu ka kooban yahay ugu yaraan 8 xaraf, hal xaraf yar, hal xaraf weyn, hal nambar, xaraf gaar ah.
order.autoRenewNotice: Ruqsaddu si otomaatig ah ayay u cusboonaan doontaa bil kasta kadib {cost} ilaa la joojinayo.
order.tosAcknowledgement: Boqsiga sanduuqaan adoo saxiixaya, waxaad aqoonsaneysaa inaad iibsaneyso alaab ruqsad ah oo si otomaatig ah u cusboonaan doonta (Sida Shuruudaha Sare Lagu Sharaxay) oo loogu shugi doono kaarka deynta aad maanta bixineyso. Haddaad dooneyso inaad joojiso cusboonaysiinta otomaatigga ah, waxaad aadi kartaa portal-ka macaamiisha si aad u doorato adeegga firfircoon oo aad gujiso xiriiriyaha Joojinta ama iimaysha: billing{'@'}interserver.net ama hab kale oo lagu sharaxay Shuruudaha iyo Xaaladaha. Adoo sanduuqa saxiixaya oo Dalabkeyga Deji gujiya hoos, waxaad sidoo kale aqoonsaneysaa inaad akhriso, fahamto, oo aad ku ogolaatay Shuruudahayaga iyo Xaaladaha iyo Siyaasadda Sirta.
order.iAgreeToTerms: Shuruudaha sare waan akhriyay oo waan ogolaanayaa.
